3abea769-0f41-4dbc-a63f-e93bf327c533.name: Muhammad Mustaqeem
3abea769-0f41-4dbc-a63f-e93bf327c533.shortLine: In your smile, I found my peace.
3abea769-0f41-4dbc-a63f-e93bf327c533.letter: To my dearest, I am writing this little note just because you have been on my mind all day. Every time I think about your smile, my heart does a tiny happy dance. Being with you is the happiest thing that has ever happened to me.
